mapper.select: SELECT cr.id , cr.user_id , u.username , u.name , cr.status , cr.reason , cr.reject_reason , cr.requested_at , cr.processed_at FROM creator_requests cr JOIN users u ON u.id = cr.user_id WHERE cr.id = #{id}

SELECT cr.id , cr.user_id , u.username , u.name , cr.status , cr.reason , cr.reject_reason , cr.requested_at , cr.processed_at FROM creator_requests cr JOIN users u ON u.id = cr.user_id ORDER BY cr.requested_at DESC
SELECT id , user_id , status , reason , reject_reason , requested_at , processed_at FROM creator_requests WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'PENDING' LIMIT 1
